parameters.query:
WITH upsert_file AS (
    INSERT INTO pokemon_files (
        pokemon_id,
        bucket_name,
        object_key,
        file_name,
        file_type,
        mime_type,
        size_bytes,
        checksum_sha256,
        source,
        source_url,
        metadata_json
    )
    VALUES (
        {{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.pokemon_id }},
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.bucket_name }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.object_key }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.file_name }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.file_type }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.mime_type }}',
        {{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.size_bytes }},
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.checksum_sha256 }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.source }}',
        '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.source_url }}',
        '{{ JSON.stringify($node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.metadata_json) }}'::jsonb
    )
    ON CONFLICT (bucket_name, object_key) DO UPDATE
    SET
        size_bytes = EXCLUDED.size_bytes,
        checksum_sha256 = EXCLUDED.checksum_sha256,
        source = EXCLUDED.source,
        source_url = EXCLUDED.source_url,
        metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json,
        ingested_at = now()
    RETURNING file_id
)
INSERT INTO file_ingestion_log (
    file_id,
    pokemon_id,
    file_name,
    bucket_name,
    object_key,
    source,
    status,
    message,
    size_bytes,
    checksum_sha256,
    workflow_run_id
)
SELECT
    file_id,
    {{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.pokemon_id }},
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.file_name }}',
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.bucket_name }}',
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.object_key }}',
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.source }}',
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.status }}',
    'n8n uploaded raw JSON to MinIO and registered metadata in PostgreSQL',
    {{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.size_bytes }},
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.checksum_sha256 }}',
    '{{ $node["Prepare Raw JSON Object"].json.workflow_run_id }}'
FROM upsert_file
RETURNING log_id, file_id, status, processed_at;
